title: Fix crash when comparing queue to scalar (#5570)

features.name: queue comparison with scalar operand
features.description: Code should include a comparison operation (== or !=) between a queue type and a scalar type

features.name: scalar comparison with queue operand
features.description: Code should include a comparison operation (== or !=) with scalar on left side and queue on right side
features.snippet:
int queue_var[$] = '{1, 2, 3};
if (1 == queue_var) begin end

features.name: queues with different element types compared
features.description: Code should include a comparison operation between queues of incompatible element types
